methods.description: This method describes the setup of control preindustrial (PI) simulations using a slab-ocean model with specific CO2 concentrations to isolate temperature effects.

steps.description: The control preindustrial (PI) simulation employs the modeling components described above in standard configuration and with CO2 concentrations set at 287 ppm.
steps.searchable_summary: Set up PI simulation with standard model configuration and CO2 at 287 ppm

steps.description: The slab-ocean forcing file for the PI case has heat fluxes, salinity, and density inputs from a fully coupled atmosphere, ocean, ice, and land simulation.
steps.searchable_summary: Fetch slab-ocean forcing file with heat fluxes, salinity, and density inputs

steps.description: Run a PI simulation at 400 ppm CO2 to compare with MMCO simulation.
steps.searchable_summary: Run PI simulation with CO2 at 400 ppm for comparison

methods.description: This method outlines the setup of Miocene Model Climate Optimum (MMCO) simulations with specific vegetation and topography settings to study climate conditions.

steps.description: The MMCO simulation has vegetation cover and topography described in Herold et al. (2011).
steps.searchable_summary: Set up MMCO simulation with specific vegetation and topography

steps.description: Use ocean heat fluxes derived from a coupled ocean-atmosphere simulation of the Miocene.
steps.searchable_summary: Process ocean heat fluxes from Miocene simulation

steps.description: Create the Miocene slab-ocean forcing file using a previous CCSM3.0 Miocene simulation.
steps.searchable_summary: Create Miocene slab-ocean forcing file from CCSM3.0 simulation

methods.description: This method involves running and analyzing a suite of simulations to study climate conditions and CO2 sensitivity.

steps.description: Run simulations for over 60 years with the last 20 used for analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: Run climate simulations for 60 years and analyze last 20 years

steps.description: Ensure simulations are well equilibrated as evidenced by radiative balance statistics.
steps.searchable_summary: Validate simulation equilibration using radiative balance statistics

steps.description: Run additional MMCO CO2 sensitivity experiments at 560 ppm and 800 ppm.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct CO2 sensitivity experiments at 560 ppm and 800 ppm
